user_request: Rerun the AMD best 4xMI350 candidate closer to Ascend with GA=8 and GBS=128, then profile AMD and compare root-cause gaps.

node_check.gpu_state: all 8 GPUs occupied, GPU use 0% but about 76% VRAM allocated per GPU
node_check.policy: Do not stop or kill external GPU workloads without explicit user approval.

shape_semantics.important_correction: On 4 GPUs, MBS=1 and GBS=128 implies GA=32, not GA=8. To have both GA=8 and GBS=128 on 4 GPUs, MBS must be 4.

current_best_amd_4x.shape: 4xMI350, MBS=1, GBS=64, GA=16, S=4096, FSDP4/EP4, no activation checkpointing, query_recompute shared-KV backward

ascend_reference_local_run.shape: 16 Ascend 910C logical dies, local_batch_size=1, GBS=128, GA=8, S=4096, EP16, full activation checkpointing

recommended_run_lanes.name: throughput_tokens_per_step_match
recommended_run_lanes.why: Matches Ascend global tokens/step while keeping the current per-GPU microbatch and memory footprint closest to the best AMD run.
recommended_run_lanes.expected_risk: Should have similar activation memory to the current MBS=1 run, but twice as many accumulation microsteps per optimizer step.

recommended_run_lanes.name: ga_cadence_match
recommended_run_lanes.why: Matches Ascend gradient accumulation cadence, but not global tokens/step.
recommended_run_lanes.expected_risk: Lower tokens/step and less comparable to the memory-equivalent throughput target.

recommended_run_lanes.name: literal_gbs128_ga8_match
recommended_run_lanes.why: Mathematically satisfies both requested GBS=128 and GA=8 on 4 GPUs.
recommended_run_lanes.expected_risk: High OOM risk for the current best no-AC path because the MBS=1 run already peaks around 144 GiB/GPU.

compare_against_ascend: End-to-end node tokens/s and normalized TFLOPs/token.
MORI routed local VJP, combine dX wait/skew, and loss/lm-head buckets.
Activation-checkpoint/no-AC caveat, because Ascend reference uses full activation checkpointing while the current AMD best is no-AC.
